title: Act IV - The First Convergence
summary: Potter provides the operational model. Ada and allies execute a constrained resonance test and achieve first direct perception of the Yggdrasil/Arboros structure.

narrative.newInfo: The 'alien contact' pattern reframes as cross-timeline human adjacency.
narrative.dripHook: Contact achieved, but public-scale consequences are now unavoidable.
narrative.payoffDelivered: Book 1 promise fulfilled: direct encounter with the world-tree architecture.
narrative.beautyHooks: Four investigative lanes collapse into one coherent cosmic model.
